The '''Strikebreaker''' was a [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]] [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle employed by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] to handle [[riot]]s. It was 14 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and could achieve speeds of 80 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] per [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] with a flight ceiling of thirty meters, but was not at all maneuverable. It required a crew of nine, including seven [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]], and carried forty [[Soldier/Legends|troops]] and two [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo. It was armed with four medium [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], 2 left and 2 right, that could be double-linked; two [[Heavy repeating blaster/Legends|heavy repeating blaster]] turrets that could be fire-linked; and a [[grenade mortar]] turret. Its most important weapon was a [[stun barricade]].<ref name="HSCS" />
